staticText: Retrenchment package planning navigation assistant. Route users to the canonical calculator without prefill. The calculator applies only the pay, service, severance weeks, notice, leave, additions, deductions, and dated rule-source values entered by the user. It does not establish entitlement, consultation compliance, selection fairness, or a lawful retrenchment. Never ask AI to calculate, verify, retain, or persist those fields. No pay, service, package, or rule-source field is sent to AI or stored in local or session storage. Results stay in memory unless the user deliberately copies, downloads a TXT estimate, or prints to PDF.
